channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年5月25日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Microsoft's 6502 BASIC is now Open Source (2025) #2 Mastering Dyalog APL #3 Childhood Computing #4 DeepSeek reasonix, DeepSeek native coding agent with high caching and low cost #5 I spent 50 hours drawing a line graph #6 Microsoft open-sources "the earliest DOS source code discovered to date" #7 I keep bouncing off the Scheme language #8 Constraint Decay: The Fragility of LLM Agents in Back End Code Generation #9 The seed oil panic is hurting my cardiac patients #10 Scammers are abusing an internal Microsoft account to send spam links

item.title: 2026年5月25日（07:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Show HN: Audiomass – a free, open-source multitrack audio editor for the web #2 DeepSeek reasonix, DeepSeek native coding agent with high caching and low cost #3 Australia Four-Day Work Week Study Data Shows Boosted Productivity #4 LAN-LOK: The Antarctic DOS Sabotage Game Lost for 34 Years #5 Memory has grown to nearly two-thirds of AI chip component costs #6 Defeating Git Rigour Fatigue with Jujutsu #7 Using HTTP/2 Cleartext for a server in Go 1.24 #8 A fundamental principle of aeronautical engineering has been overturned #9 Constraint Decay: The Fragility of LLM Agents in Back End Code Generation #10 I spent 50 hours drawing a line graph
